---
title: "loop.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\loop.py"
loc: 165
complexity: 20
logic_score: 1.10
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 5.28
overall_score: 2.21
---

## Intent
The `loop.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignForge, __init__, forge_task, _write_handshake, _orient_target, _generate_code, call_uplink, _verify_integrity, _backup, _rollback, _cleanup_backup, SovereignLifecycle, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignForge, __init__, forge_task, _write_handshake, _orient_target, _generate_code, call_uplink, _verify_integrity, _backup, _rollback, _cleanup_backup, SovereignLifecycle, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 25 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [gc](file://gc)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)
- [src.tools.wrap_it_up](file://src.tools.wrap_it_up)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)

### Exports
- `SovereignForge`
- `__init__`
- `forge_task`
- `_write_handshake`
- `_orient_target`
- `_generate_code`
- `call_uplink`
- `_verify_integrity`
- `_backup`
- `_rollback`
- `_cleanup_backup`
- `SovereignLifecycle`
- `execute`
